text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, I'm Mejiro Bright. I do like to take
things at my own pace, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured that I will train hard to catch up to
the rest of my kin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So please, you needn't go easy on me. ♪

<chrname> and I have a long road
ahead of us, but we're officially on our way!
